vulnerability.reference: Developer automation bias and trust in AI suggestions reduce manual code inspection.
vulnerability.generated: Developers habitually accept AI code completions without security review, trusting functional correctness implies safety.

impact.reference: Insecure code committed to repositories, leading to downstream exploits.
impact.generated: Insecure code enters production software, causing widespread exploitable vulnerabilities and security breaches.

dose_response.reference: Adversarial prompt injection in IDEs causes LLMs to generate insecure code, and developer automation bias leads to insecure code commits.
dose_response.generated: Query-based adversarial prompts, through developers using AI code assistants, trigger habitual acceptance of completions without security review, leading to insecure code in production causing exploitable vulnerabilities and breaches.
